category_sources: source_facts.description says esoteric parody programming language; official INTERCAL resources page describes the INTERCAL language and C-INTERCAL compiler.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is intercal; official README identifies the package as C-INTERCAL, the implementation provided by the distribution.
docs_sources: Official INTERCAL resources page provides documentation links including README and the Revamped INTERCAL Manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official INTERCAL resources page states the codebase is available for git cloning at gitlab.com/esr/intercal.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables; official resources page and README describe INTERCAL, C-INTERCAL, compiler documentation, and implementation details.
